prompt: An adult East Asian woman walking slowly in the shallow waves of a tropical or Mediterranean beach during the evening golden hour. Full-body shot from slightly above head level to the wet sand. Profile view positioned in the center-right, facing the open sea to the right. Head slightly lowered, looking at the water in quiet contemplation. Tall, slender, natural athletic build, warm fair skin, exquisite facial features, a delicate nose bridge, soft lip shape, and an elegant posture. Right leg stepping forward in shallow water; left leg trailing behind with the heel lifted and toes touching the wet sand—a slow pace pausing at the tide line. Left arm hanging naturally; right arm near the front hip. Realistic and understated human proportions. Hairstyle: Very long black hair falling below the middle of the back—strongly blown to the left by the sea breeze, creating loose strands and sweeping curves behind the head, neck, and shoulders. A few fine strands cross the cheek and partially obscure the profile. Delicate golden rim lighting, real individual hair strands, slightly disheveled. Swimwear: minimalist white halter-neck bikini—softly ruched triangle cups, thin neck ties, and thin waist ties. White bikini bottoms at the natural hip. Opaque, well-fitting, no logo. Sarong: Lightweight white translucent beach sarong tied in a soft knot at the front right of the waist. Draping asymmetrically over the upper thigh, revealing the bikini bottom while providing modest coverage. Long sections of fabric drape dramatically to the left—blown by the wind. Fine woven texture, translucent layers, delicate wrinkles, soft edges, and glowing backlit highlights. Light and responsive to the sea breeze. Waterline: A thin layer of clear seawater covering a smooth reflective sand surface. Small foamy bubbles curl around the feet, extending diagonally from the lower-right foreground to the mid-left distance. Subtle reflections of the legs and feet in the wet sand, softened by ripples. Fine splashes around the lifted back foot; the front foot creates a natural indentation in the sand. Sea: Right half of the frame—pale blue-gray, soft silver, and understated teal. Gentle irregular wave ripples, exquisite white foam, with sunlight dancing and sparkling on the surface. The coastline extends from the bottom center to the far left—a strong diagonal leading line. Left beach: Wide, smooth, warm beige, with a slightly darker band of wet sand near the tide line. Background: Far left—a blurred row of umbrellas, lounge areas, trees, and a few tiny anonymous tourists, heavily out of focus. Beyond the coastline are dramatic rocky islands or coastal mountains—towering narrow central rock spires with steep vertical ridges, with lower dark slopes dropping toward the sea. Atmospheric, slightly hazy, not sharp. Upper background: Glowing light peach-gray sky with thin horizontal clouds. The sun hangs low outside the frame in the upper left—warm backlighting, misty atmospheric perspective, and a soft golden glow over the mountains and beach. The distant view gradually loses contrast and saturation, enhancing the sense of depth. Lighting: Warm diffused golden hour light from behind and slightly to the left—delicate sunlight rim lighting on the left edges of the hair, shoulders, upper arms, waist, legs, sarong, and feet. Soft frontal reflections from the water and light-colored sand preserve facial and body details. Gentle open shadows, smooth highlight transitions. Tones: Ivory, warm beige, light peach, smoky blue-gray, soft teal, charcoal mountain tones, and restrained gold. Refined cinematic grading: slightly desaturated shadows, warm glowing skin, exquisite haziness, and a subtle nostalgic film texture. No heavy saturation or orange skin. Camera: Waist height, full-frame 85mm, f/2.2–f/3.2. Subject/swimwear/sarong/feet are sharp and clear; distant mountains/beach activities/trees dissolve into a creamy atmospheric blur. Natural perspective compression. Luxury resort photography, high-end swimwear editorial, analog film grain, soft highlight halation, high dynamic range, cinematic realism. Negative: No text, no logo, no watermark, no prominent extra people, no branding, no deformed hands or feet, no extra fingers or toes, no duplicate limbs, no exaggerated poses, no transparent swimwear, no plastic skin, no harsh direct flash, no oversaturated colors, no artificial HDR, no deformed mountain geometry, no cluttered foreground elements.

promptZh: 一位 成年东亚女性 在 热带或地中海海滩 的傍晚黄金时刻，在浅滩中缓慢行走。全身镜头，视角略高于头部，直至湿润的沙滩。侧面视角，位于画面中右侧，面向右侧开阔的海面。头部微垂，静静地注视着水面，神情沉思。身材高挑纤细，自然运动型体格，肤色白皙温暖，五官精致，鼻梁秀气，唇形柔和，姿态优雅。右腿在浅水中迈步；左腿在后，脚后跟抬起，脚趾触碰湿沙——步伐缓慢，在潮汐线处停顿。左臂自然下垂；右臂靠近前侧髋部。人体比例写实且内敛。发型：极长的黑色长发垂至后背中部——被海风强烈地吹向左侧，在头部、颈部和肩后形成凌乱的发丝和飘逸的曲线。几缕细发掠过脸颊，部分遮挡了侧脸。精致的金色轮廓光，真实的单根发丝，略显凌乱。泳装：极简白色挂脖比基尼——柔软的褶皱三角杯，细颈带，细腰带。白色比基尼底裤位于自然髋部位置。不透明，贴合身形，无 Logo。纱笼：轻盈的白色半透明海滩纱笼，在腰部右前方系成一个柔和的结。不对称地披在在大腿上部，既露出比基尼底裤又提供了适度的遮盖。长段布料向左侧戏剧性地垂落——随风飘动。精细的编织纹理，半透明的层次，细腻的褶皱，柔和的边缘，以及发光的背光高光。轻盈且随海风摆动。水位线：一层薄薄的清澈海水覆盖在平滑且具有反射感的沙面上。细小的泡沫在脚边卷起，从右下前景向左中远景呈对角线延伸。湿沙中映出腿部和脚部的微妙倒影，被涟漪柔化。抬起的后脚周围有细小的水花；前脚在沙滩上留下自然的压痕。海洋：画面右半部分——淡蓝灰色、柔和的银色和内敛的青色。轻柔不规则的波浪涟漪，精致的白色泡沫，阳光在水面上跳跃闪烁。海岸线从底部中心向远左侧延伸——一条强有力的对角线引导线。左侧海滩：宽阔、平滑、温暖的米色，潮汐线附近有一条颜色稍深的湿沙带。背景：远左侧——模糊的遮阳伞、休息区、树木和几个微小的匿名游客，处于深度虚化状态。海岸线之外是壮观的岩石岛屿或沿海山脉——高耸狭窄的中央岩石尖塔，带有陡峭的垂直山脊，较低的深色坡面朝向大海倾斜。氛围感强，略带朦胧，不锐利。背景上方：发光的浅桃灰色天空，带有细长的水平云层。太阳悬挂在左上角画面外——温暖的逆光，朦胧的大气透视，山脉和海滩上笼罩着柔和的金色光芒。远景逐渐失去对比度和饱和度，增强了空间深度感。光影：来自后方和左后方的温暖漫射黄金时刻光线——头发左侧边缘、肩膀、上臂、腰部、腿部、纱笼和脚部有精致的阳光轮廓光。来自水面和浅色沙滩的柔和正面反射保留了面部和身体的细节。柔和的开放式阴影，平滑的高光过渡。色调：象牙色、暖米色、浅桃色、烟蓝灰色、柔和青色、炭灰色山脉色调和克制的金色。精致的电影级调色：略微去饱和的阴影，温暖发光的皮肤，精致的朦胧感，以及微妙的怀旧胶片质感。无强烈的饱和度或橙色皮肤。相机：腰部高度，全画幅 85mm，f/2.2–f/3.2。主体/泳装/纱笼/脚部清晰锐利；远处的山脉/海滩活动/树木溶解在奶油般的大气虚化中。自然的透视压缩。奢华度假摄影，高端泳装大片，模拟胶片颗粒，柔和的高光晕影，高动态范围，电影级写实。负面提示：无文字，无 Logo，无水印，无明显的额外人物，无品牌标识，无畸形的手或脚，无多余的手指或脚趾，无重复的肢体，无夸张的姿势，无透明泳装，无塑料感皮肤，无强烈的直接闪光，无过饱和色彩，无人工 HDR，无畸形的几何山体，无杂乱的前景元素。
